problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
